title: FlyingSpider's Autumn/Fall modpack
description: An Autumn/Fall styled pack with plenty content even for an SMP. I do not own any of the mods made inside this modpack but have edited them. All mod credit goes to original creators.
body:
FlyingSpider's Autumn Pack

_**An modpack focusing on bringing Autumn and Halloween to Minecraft whilst adding plenty content for other activities too.**_ Check out: - New autumn themed biomes and structures! - A wider range of animals like deer, cute pumpkin bats and variants - Fight off the corruption of the End - Millions of choices for decoration! Camping equipment, kitchen stuffs - Progress further than ever before with advanced netherite and dragon loot! - Find lost relics from a time long ago - Experimenting with technology using Create - QOL mods to create the most pleasureable experience - ~~Perhaps something more.. spooky lay within~~ Optimised by yours truly to try keep this running as smoothy as possible. Please make sure to use at least the resource pack "Autumnpack". Shaders are provided but feel free to use your own!! I do not own any of the mods made inside this modpack but have edited them. All mod credit goes to original creators. I would also appreciate credit if you plan to use my pack :P [Report Issues here](https://github.com/flyingspider69/Autumn-pack-Issues/issues) Discord Server WIP
